title: Here’s the Marriage Advice Adam Sandler Gave Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce While Officiating Their Wedding
summary: Andy Reid shared the "touching" tip the comedian/wedding officiant gave newlyweds Swift and Kelce.
body: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce received “really touching” marriage advice from Adam Sandler, who officiated the couple’s wedding, reveals Kansas City Chiefs coach Andy Reid. Related Here’s Everything We Know About Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding So Far Donna Kelce Shares Her Thoughts on Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding Vows: What Guests Have Revealed Kelce’s coach praised Sandler in an interview on CNN Sunday afternoon (July 5) — two days after seeing the bride and groom say “I do” — for doing a “phenomenal job” as officiant for their wedding ceremony. Reid also offered a glimpse at what the comedic actor told Swift and Kelce during the service. “He said, ‘Kiss every chance you have, every day,'” Reid said. “‘Whether you’re going to bed or going to work or, you know, wherever, go ahead and kiss her.’ And I thought that was, in a simple way, in its simplest form, it really was touching.” Reid added of Swift and Kelce, “I’ve had a chance to see them grow together, and that’s the most i…

title: Donna Kelce Shares Her Thoughts on Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding
summary: Here's what Swift's mother-in-law had to say about the couple's big Madison Square Garden event.
body: Donna Kelce, Travis Kelce’s mom and now Taylor Swift ‘s mother-in-law, is the newlyweds’ first immediate family member to publicly talk about the wedding festivities that took place in New York City at Madison Square Garden Friday night (July 3). Related Here’s Everything We Know About Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding So Far Taylor Swift & Travis Kelce’s Wedding Vows: What Guests Have Revealed Maren Morris Reveals Custom Gift From Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s Wedding Mama Kelce made an appearance at the city’s annual Macy’s Fourth of July Fireworks event while she was in town to see her son, who’s the tight end for the Kansas City Chiefs, marry the pop superstar. Donna walked the Macy’s red carpet looking quite patriotic on Saturday (July 4), the day after the wedding, wearing an American flag tunic, white trousers, a red statement necklace and red-framed eyeglasses. She took part in an interview at the Macy’s event, as seen in a video posted on the department store’s Instagram account. Of course, Mrs. Kelce was asked about Taylor and Travis’ shindig — a late-night ce…

title: Good Morning, Earth!
summary: NASA astronaut Chris Williams took this photo of an orbital sunrise from the International Space Station on June 26, 2026. In 24 hours, the space station makes 16 orbits of Earth, traveling through 16 sunrises and sunsets. Learn more about the orbiting laboratory. Image credit: NASA/Chris Williams
body: A bright orange sunburst illuminates Earth’s atmosphere during an orbital sunrise in this photograph from the International Space Station as it orbited 264 miles above the Caucasus Mountains. NASA/Chris Williams NASA astronaut Chris Williams took this photo of an orbital sunrise from the International Space Station on June 26, 2026. In 24 hours, the space station makes 16 orbits of Earth, traveling through 16 sunrises and sunsets. Learn more about the orbiting laboratory. Image credit: NASA/Chris Williams
